subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Ayat-i-az Suriy-i-Furqan
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed Himself unto the peoples of the contingent world and shed the effulgent lights of His beauty upon all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی علی اهل الامکان و افاض انوار الجمال لمن فی الاکوان بطراز
